content_html:
WWDC26 — The Small Things

My favorite Apple updates are not the flashy new features, but the quiet little touches: annoyances fixed, workflows made smoother, rough edges sanded down, and longstanding flaws thoughtfully reworked. To me, they’re the clearest sign of a company that cares about its craft.

Here’s a collection from a WWDC26 screen-grab, organized for easier reading, on improvements coming later this year.

Photos

  • Add keywords to photos and videos

  • Filter photos and videos in Shared Albums

  • Album organization improvements

  • Full-resolution photos and videos in iCloud Shared Albums

  • Additional participant permissions in Shared Albums

  • Easier invitations to Shared Albums

  • Participate in Shared Albums from Android and Windows

  • Shared Album expiration controls

  • Search photos and videos using additional metadata

  • Search returns better people and pet photos

  • Save a video frame as a photo

  • Save slideshows as videos

  • Customize slideshows

  • Photo Shuffle: choose a specific pet

  • Option to include photos of yourself in Photo Shuffle

  • Captured by Me collection

  • Faster loading of new captures

  • Faster rendering of Collections view

  • More accurate photo orientation

  • Star ratings in Photos

  • Identity Documents collection

  • Faster opening from Photos widget

Messages

  • Faster message loading

  • Improved syncing across devices

  • Find offloaded media in Messages

  • Thumbnails for offloaded media

  • Drawing in Messages

  • Consolidated notifications for multiple Tapbacks

  • Continuous sending of photos, videos, and text

  • Search conversations by phone number or nickname

  • Faster access to recent camera captures

  • Content-aware sharing suggestions

  • Failed messages automatically retry sending

  • Improved Top Results

  • More reliable search indexing

  • Improved unread badge accuracy

  • Improved list formatting

Safari

  • Enhanced power efficiency

  • Faster start page loading

  • Faster web app performance

  • Faster JavaScript handling

  • Smoother scrolling

  • Smoother animations and graphics

  • Smoother start-page resizing

  • Faster content loading

  • Multiple tab views in visionOS Safari

Apple Music & Podcasts

  • Improved Apple Music streaming reliability

  • New AutoMix transitions

  • Refreshed album pages

  • Refreshed artist pages

  • Faster playback start

  • Faster Now Playing loading

  • Redesigned Podcasts app for tvOS

  • Search within podcast shows

  • Updated video podcast experience

Maps

  • More accurate Visited Places

  • Visited Places in more countries

  • Guides available in more places

  • Enhanced Flyover

  • More accurate workout route maps

  • Natural-language route searching

  • Maps Parked Car widget

Health & Fitness

  • Faster Health app data updates

  • Synced step counts between Health and Fitness

  • More accurate Apple Watch step tracking

  • Improved treadmill distance accuracy

  • Faster workout start

  • Perimenopause symptom logging

  • Perimenopause educational content

  • Perimenopause support across Health features

  • Fitness+ workouts for perimenopause and menopause

  • Support for time-zone changes in Sleep

Apple Watch / watchOS

  • Better battery efficiency

  • Improved Wi-Fi connectivity

  • Guest Key support

  • Dynamic app grid

  • Independent alarm volume

  • Faster app extension launches

  • Faster media playback

  • Live Activities in Smart Stack

  • Transit cards and IDs in Smart Stack

  • New Smart Stack suggestions

  • View Wallet card balances

  • More efficient water detection

  • Tap gesture improvements

  • Consolidated Find My app

  • Updated Weather views

HomeKit / Home App / Smart Home

  • Improved Thread accessory connectivity

  • Faster smart-home accessory updates

  • Faster HomeKit pairing

  • Support for 4K camera recordings

  • View multiple camera streams simultaneously

  • More reliable HomeKit camera storage

  • More power-efficient Personal Hotspot

  • Improved Bluetooth power management

CarPlay

  • Audio scrubbing in Now Playing

  • Improved GPS accuracy

  • Better navigation headings

  • Improved wireless CarPlay reliability

  • Audio MiniPlayer

Shortcuts

  • Else-if support

  • Group conversation support

  • Expanded “Get What’s On Screen”

  • Store data in Shortcuts

  • Redesigned editor

  • Screenshot automations

  • Notification automations

  • Faster indexing of actions and shortcuts

Notes

  • Section links

  • Copy and paste as Markdown

  • Divider lines

Freeform

  • Faster board previews

  • Smoother board performance

  • Edge-to-edge sidebars

  • Dark Mode adaptive canvas

  • Drawing in Freeform on macOS

  • Collaborative folders

  • More reliable right-to-left text editing

Journal

  • More intuitive streak tracking

  • Cloud sync status

  • Increased attachment limits

  • Time stamps for entries

Find My

  • Live Activity for Precision Finding

  • More flexible sharing

  • Richer collaboration previews

  • Find My UI enhancements

Wallet & Apple Pay

  • Easier card selection and payment management

  • Wallet Order Tracking in Australia and Canada

  • Proactive Car Key setup

Calendar & Reminders

  • Smoother Calendar scrolling

  • Modify multiple events at once

  • Streamlined event details

  • Grocery List language expansion

  • Expanded autocategorization languages

Keyboard & Language Support

New Languages / Layouts

  • English (Philippines)

  • English (Canada)

  • Slovenian

  • Estonian

  • Afrikaans

  • Basque

  • Baybayin

  • Galician

  • Guarani

  • Luxembourgish

  • Xhosa

  • Zulu

  • Blackfoot

  • Comanche

  • Cree

  • Kiowa

  • Tsuu’tina

Typing Improvements

  • Automatic punctuation for multilingual typing

  • Multilingual handwriting recognition improvements

  • Multilingual grammar checking

  • Smart language suggestions

  • Improved Chinese punctuation suggestions

  • Better Chinese and Japanese input conversion

  • QuickPath improvements for Vietnamese VNI

  • Scribble support for Hindi and Marathi

  • Natural-language time formats for Chinese and Hindi

  • Context-aware typing suggestions for Chinese and Japanese

Accessibility

  • Easier PDF editing with VoiceOver

  • Faster Voice Control response

  • Streamlined Assistive Access setup

  • Faster entry/exit from Assistive Access and Guided Access

  • Show Borders accessibility feature

  • Streamlined Touch Accommodations setup

  • MFi hearing device pairing improvements

Apple TV / tvOS

  • Faster AirPlay to Apple TV

  • Smart downloads

  • More responsive Control Center

  • AppleCare details in Settings

  • Larger text sizes

  • Smoother animations and app launches

visionOS

  • Use panoramas for Environments

  • Extra-small widgets

  • New curved windows

  • Improved Control Center

  • Expanded Sidecar touch support

  • Support for Mac mirroring in 5K

  • Look-and-tap notification interaction

  • Spatial scene support for panoramas

  • Faster boot and Wi-Fi connection

  • Mac Virtual Display widget

  • Multiple Safari tab views

iPadOS

  • Undo/redo Home Screen edits

  • Extra-large Today View widgets

  • Faster window closing

  • Faster window switching

  • Optional persistent menu bar

  • Faster Files browsing and transfers

  • App names in status bar

  • iPhone app resizing

  • Faster menu bar access

macOS

  • Drawing in Notes

  • Ethernet status in menu bar

  • Improved RDMA over Thunderbolt

  • Updated menu bar icons

  • Faster account creation

  • HDR system UI support

  • Mission Control animation improvements

  • More seamless Wi-Fi/cellular transitions

System-Wide Improvements

  • More relevant Spotlight results

  • Web audio no longer interrupts system audio

  • Improved game controller support

  • Improved PlayStation Access controller support

  • Faster PDF saving

  • More document formats in Preview

  • Better battery insights

  • Improved app launch speed

  • Optimized CPU scheduler

  • Consistent window positioning across displays

  • More display modes for external monitors

  • Faster network file browsing

  • Faster AirDrop transfers

  • Faster AirDrop recipient discovery

  • Faster NFC reading

  • Real-time widget updates

  • Improved Control Center scrolling

  • Smoother app animations

  • Improved Bluetooth management

———

Follow me  (always one click unfollow)

title: Apple OS 27: The Small Things
